overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene from Red Dead Redemption 2, showing a first-person view from a wooden Victorian porch at golden hour. The camera remains stationary, capturing warm sunset light filtering through dense oak trees draped with Spanish moss.

scene_state.functional_zone: Victorian porch overlooking forest at sunset

tall white wooden support column with hanging Spanish moss

dense cluster of live oak trees heavy with hanging Spanish moss, silhouetted against sunset
bright golden sun disk visible through tree canopy, creating volumetric light rays

segments.scene_description: A static, atmospheric view from a wooden Victorian porch at golden hour, looking out over dense oak trees draped with Spanish moss. The camera sits behind a green rocking chair, framed by white porch columns and railing, as warm sunset light filters through the canopy. The light gradually softens from intense gold to muted pink tones over the course of the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a stationary, atmospheric view from a Victorian porch as the intense golden light of sunset gradually softens into muted pink tones. It begins behind a green rocking chair, framed by white porch columns and railings that look out over a dense canopy of oak trees draped in Spanish moss. As the camera remains still, the warm sunlight filtering through the foliage begins to shift in intensity. The scene then transitions as the vibrant gold hues fade, allowing the environment to be bathed in a deepening, rosy twilight.
